summary: A recorded Fox News segment with on-screen network chyrons covering Operation Buckeye, cutting between the Columbus mayor's remarks, an interview with ICE Deputy Director Madison Sheahan, and a Fox studio mugshot graphic. It is a TV news broadcast clip, not produced youth-appeal entertainment.
notable_text: MAYOR: COLUMBUS 'ALREADY SAFE' WITHOUT FEDS HERE
I.C.E.: OPERATION BUCKEYE NABS ALIENS CONVICTED OF SEX OFFENSES, DRUG POSSESSION, FELONY ROBBERY
